assessment.summary_for_seller: Workable run, but trust and next step are not landing on all key points yet.

criteria.name: Contextual first contact
criteria.short_reason: First message anchors to a specific signal from the card.
criteria.evidence_quote: Concrete boundary from line one: Mellow handles contractor documents, KYC, payment chain operations, and audit trail; legal qualification and strategic risk decisions remain on your side.
criteria.label: Contextual opening

criteria.name: Compliance and boundary of responsibility

criteria.evidence_quote: Concrete boundary from line one: Mellow handles contractor documents, KYC, payment chain operations, and audit trail; legal qualification and strategic risk decisions remain on your side.
criteria.label: Scope & responsibility boundary

criteria.name: Handling core objections
criteria.short_reason: Objections addressed weakly or not followed through.
criteria.evidence_quote: Concrete boundary from line one: Mellow handles contractor documents, KYC, payment chain operations, and audit trail; legal qualification and strategic risk decisions remain on your side.

objections.objection: I've built processes around multiple vendors. Each time it costs more than promised.
Wait. I still don't understand how to bring this to finance.
Send me one screen with the flow and what specifically stops being manual. If it's real, we can talk.

criteria.label: Core objection handling

criteria.name: Next step
criteria.evidence_quote: Pricing model: per contractor/month, with volume tiers. There's a pilot option to test on a subset before committing. Want me to send a rough calculation? What else do you need for the next step?
criteria.label: Clear next step
